<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TopK; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/topk.query/ * * Checks whether an item is one of Top-K items. * Multiple items can be checked at once. */ class TOPKQUERY extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TOPK.QUERY'; } }
